display-name.lang: United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland
United Kingdom of Great Britain and Northern Ireland

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie sets off from Runcorn on the Bridgewater Canal, but a series of unfortunate mishaps soon tests his patience - from lost camera footage to closed canals.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie slips and falls overboard on Heartbreak Hill. Also, Eddie 'the Stove Man' and his enormous German Shepherd fix the fireplace on the old Naughty Lass.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie mends a leaky pump on the Naughty Lass on the Grand Union Canal. In Watford, he visits a TV legend's home and buys gas from a friendly fuel boat.

programme.title: Jennifer and Joanna Absolutely Champers
programme.desc: Two of the country's best-loved comedians, Joanna Lumley and Jennifer Saunders, take a trip to France to find out how to put the bubbles into bubbly.

programme.title: Seven Worlds One Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough narrates a look at life on each continent, revealing how each distinct land mass has shaped the creatures found there, beginning with Antarctica.

programme.title: Seven Worlds One Planet
programme.desc: David Attenborough looks at life in Asia, with footage of walruses gathering in huge numbers in the frozen north and brown bears roaming around remote Russian volcanoes.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie sets off from Runcorn on the Bridgewater Canal, but a series of unfortunate mishaps soon tests his patience - from lost camera footage to closed canals.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie slips and falls overboard on Heartbreak Hill. Also, Eddie 'the Stove Man' and his enormous German Shepherd fix the fireplace on the old Naughty Lass.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Classic sitcom with Michael Crawford as that one-man disaster area, Frank Spencer. Frank spends the weekend wrecking his brother-in-law's hi-tech house.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: The theme tune to this classic sitcom spells out its title in Morse code! Frank rushes to the rescue when Betty's Mum falls ill. Michael Crawford stars.

programme.title: Some Mothers Do 'Ave 'Em
programme.desc: Have a Break, Take a Husband: Michael Crawford stars as the hapless, one-man disaster area that is Frank Spencer. Frank and Betty head to the seaside for their second honeymoon.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Restoring Classics
programme.desc: The guys buy a confusing 1984 French Matra Murena and send it to Citroen specialists. Next, they take on a Bond classic - no, not that one - a 1977 Arctic Wetbike.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Making Dave go weak at the knees is a very rare eighties hot hatch - a Citroen Visa GT Tonic.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek is heading to Scotland to collect a 'special' Bentley that's been created by a very talented amateur.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Gus and Will want to buy a VW Beetle. They locate a guy selling a project car, but fear it's almost too good to be true at less than 1,000 pounds.

programme.title: Flipping Bangers
programme.desc: Will and Gus find a Reliant Kitten that an engineer has given up on - the body is detached, it doesn't run and most of the bits it needs are in boxes in the boot.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: The motoring fan attempts, with the help of slipstreaming, to break the British record for outright speed on a bicycle with the help of Olympian Laura Trott.

programme.title: Speed with Guy Martin
programme.desc: The motorbike racer and mechanic heads to Bala Lake to try to set the world record for riding a motorcycle on the surface of water.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Suffolk to collect two Bentleys with a majestic pedigree; Cynthia a stunning 1963 S3 and Harry, a 1965 Continental.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave heads to West Yorkshire for a 1926 Dodge bus. Derek gets his hands on a rare Vauxhall Victor VX 90 police car expected to sell for more than a few coppers.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Legendary actor Laurence Olivier narrates the definitive series on World War II. Hear why Germany, stricken by defeat in WWI, looked to Adolf Hitler for hope.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: One of the largest Nazi bunkers ever constructed, outside the French town of Watten, a missile facility with storage for 108 missiles and two launch pads.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team examine artefacts brought to the Old Royal Naval College in Greenwich, including the personal effects of Queen Mary's bodyguard.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team search for treasure at the Old Royal Naval College at Greenwich, where items include a rare set of medals.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek's search for the unusual lands him a 1947 Lea Francis that's half-made of wood. Paul heads for the countryside to pick up a Morris one tonne truck.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave and Jack head to East Yorkshire to pick up a dusty Alfa Romeo and a 1930s Jowett. But Dave's more taken with a Carry On-style, bum-wobbling exercise machine. S.

programme.title: The World at War
programme.desc: Legendary actor Laurence Olivier narrates the definitive series on World War II. Hear why Germany, stricken by defeat in WWI, looked to Adolf Hitler for hope.

programme.title: Secret Nazi Bases
programme.desc: One of the largest Nazi bunkers ever constructed, outside the French town of Watten, a missile facility with storage for 108 missiles and two launch pads.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Fiona Bruce and the team examine artefacts brought to the Old Royal Naval College in Greenwich, including the personal effects of Queen Mary's bodyguard.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Robbie helps rescue a runaway narrowboat on the scenic Macclesfield Canal and cruises through autumn scenery toward Congleton to see a shipwreck up for sale.

programme.title: Canal Boat Diaries
programme.desc: Fallen trees block Robbie's journey on the Peak Forest Canal. Later, he meets TV host Terry Christian, whose dad once worked a local waterway.

programme.title: Operation Gold Rush
programme.desc: Dan and his team attempt to traverse perilous waterways as they follow in the footsteps of 19th-century Klondike gold rush prospectors.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Derek's search for the unusual lands him a 1947 Lea Francis that's half-made of wood. Paul heads for the countryside to pick up a Morris one tonne truck.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash
programme.desc: Dave and Jack head to East Yorkshire to pick up a dusty Alfa Romeo and a 1930s Jowett. But Dave's more taken with a Carry On-style, bum-wobbling exercise machine. S.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: Brokenwood's ukulele scene hits a deadly note when the local group's star member is strangled by his own instrument. But who pulled the strings? S12 E5

programme.title: Coldwater
programme.desc: Tensions rise as John and Fiona are forced to attend the funeral of a beloved local resident; John's secret becomes dangerously close to being exposed. S1 E3

programme.title: Q+A With Jack Tame
programme.desc: Hosted by Jack Tame, Q+A brings viewers the important political interviews and discussions of the week, taking a close look at politics, economics, and global events.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: The more you know, the further you go. Knowledge equals speed as contestants battle it out to reach the finish line first. Action-packed quiz fun with Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Long-running drama with the residents of England's most famous cobbled street.

programme.title: Go Girls
programme.desc: Levi finds a sure fire way to crush Tiana, while Alice's naughty weekend leads to big trouble. S5 E4

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Deal Or No Deal Australia
programme.desc: Join host Grant Denyer for a round of this high pressure and high stakes game show, where contestants face up to the Banker and must decide: is it Deal or No Deal?

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing! Hosted by Bradley Walsh.

programme.title: 1News at Six
programme.desc: The nation's leading team of journalists brings viewers the latest news and sport, plus the most comprehensive weather report.

programme.title: Seven Sharp
programme.desc: Join Hilary Barry, Jeremy Wells and the team for a fresh perspective on today's stories.

programme.title: Celebrity Tipping Point NZ
programme.desc: It’s Shorty stars past and present, Michael Galvin, Kim Crossman and Ria Vandervis. Will they flatline, or can they extract the jackpot counter from our mighty machine with surgical precision?

programme.title: The Secret Genius Of Modern Life
programme.desc: Hannah hits the production line with appliance giants Bosch to find the lifeblood at the heart of every fridge and gets a lesson in carrot droop.

programme.title: Would I Lie To You?
programme.desc: Rob, David and Lee show off the best unseen bits of Season 8.

programme.title: Tip Toe
programme.desc: When Clive meets Diane, a chance of romance makes him confess long-held secrets. But a shock discovery makes his war with Leo escalate, and both households hurtle towards danger. S1 E3

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Chris can't help himself.

programme.title: Paramedics
programme.desc: Season Finale: A baby could arrive before Bill gets the pregnant mother to hospital. Nhi and Carlos crash a birthday party after the guest of honour collapses in front of her terrified family.

programme.title: Endangered Species Aotearoa with WWF
programme.desc: Season Finale: Pax and Nicola travel to the Cook Islands to catch a glimpse of Rarotonga’s most threatened inhabitants. S1 E6

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: Infomercials
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Te Karere
programme.desc: Te Karere brings you key events and stories of interest to Māori as well as bringing a Māori perspective to the day's news and current affairs.

programme.title: BNZ Business Breakfast
programme.desc: Join BNZ Business Breakfast for a sharp, authoritative start to the business day. In just 30 minutes we set the agenda — fast, focused, and forward-looking.

programme.title: Breakfast
programme.desc: Start your day off right as the Breakfast team brings you all the latest in news, weather, sport and entertainment.

programme.title: The Finish Line
programme.desc: The more you know, the further you go. Knowledge equals speed as contestants battle it out to reach the finish line first. Action-packed quiz fun with Roman Kemp and Sarah Greene.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Fantastic quiz show in which four players take on a machine in the hopes of winning its 10,000 pounds jackpot. Only one can win!

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: It's game on as teams of complete strangers work together to win money and try and defeat the Chaser, a ruthless quiz genius, who wants to leave them with nothing!

programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: Gameshow hosted by Warwick Davis. Five contestants attempt to answer top 10 list questions for the chance to win a big cash prize. The more top ten lists, the greater the jackpot.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: Aussie rock legend Jimmy Barnes tasks the Top 24 to cook with fresh, seasonal ingredients in their first Mystery Box challenge, with the best dish securing immunity. S18 E4

programme.title: The Hundred With Andy Lee
programme.desc: Host Andy Lee is joined in the studio by a panel of Australia's funniest comedians and a 100 regular Aussies via Zoom to explore the fun behind the facts that make us tick.

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: Charlie fights for his life at Westside with Hannah by his side; a familiar face returns to Westside and Amy is not happy about it. S2 E12

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Nolan is put to the test when he's forced to protect a man he doesn't trust; Lucy and Celina follow a promising lead; Lopez finds herself conflicted about Wesley's new position. S8 E16

programme.title: Firebite
programme.desc: Season Finale: Shanika storms the pub to fight Eleona and kill newly turned wild vampire Tyson. S1 E8

programme.title: The Fatal Attraction Murder
programme.desc: Series Premiere: After 27 years in prison, Carolyn Warmus speaks for the first time since her release. S1 E1

programme.title: Highway Patrol
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call over the welfare of a man in in a carpark. Almost incoherent and potentially about to overdose, emergency services are called just in time.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: LES MILLS Born To Move
programme.desc: Designed to nurture a life-long love of physical activity, BORN TO MOVE helps children experience the joy and vitality of moving to music, combining fun and fitness in way that children love.

programme.title: Kiri and Lou
programme.desc: Kiri and Lou follows the adventures of Kiri, a feisty little dinosaur with overpowering emotions, and Lou, a gentle but thoughtful creature. Follow the friendship of these two prehistoric creatures.

programme.title: Toi Time
programme.desc: Toi Time is back with a bang! Join Aunty Anika, Māia, Jojo, Tama, Buzz, and the new kid on the block, Riki. Get ready for laughter, learning, and lots of fun!

programme.title: The Smurfs
programme.desc: Join this merry band of Smurfs on their many magical adventures as they try to outsmart the wicked sorcerer Gargamel and his cat Azrael.

programme.title: Sonic Boom
programme.desc: Sonic, Tails, Amy, Knuckles, and Sticks reside on Seaside Island in Hedgehog Village. Together they defend the island from various threats like Doctor Eggman and his robotic creations.

programme.title: Teen Titans Go!
programme.desc: Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy are superheroes and roommates who love to save the day. But what happens when they're not fighting crime?

programme.title: Darwin And Newts
programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are a brother and sister duo who love adventures and figuring out how stuff works! Join them as they explore and discover new things, with the help of science and some Kiwi ingenuity.

programme.title: Tākaro Tribe
programme.desc: Come join the Tākaro Tribe! They sing and dance their way through their magical alphabet forest, meeting friends and whānau and learning as they go.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: Aussie rock legend Jimmy Barnes tasks the Top 24 to cook with fresh, seasonal ingredients in their first Mystery Box challenge, with the best dish securing immunity. S18 E4

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: John and Remi interrogate Sonny's strange behaviour. Dana clashes with Alf. Mackenzie struggles to process her trauma.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: Bridge Of Lies
programme.desc: Ross Kemp hosts a nail-biting quiz. Using knowledge, strategy and a little luck, contestants must cross the Bridge, spotting the lies. One wrong step and they lose everything!

programme.title: Everyday Gourmet With Justine Schofield
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia finalist Justine Schofield shares some of her favourite recipes in this cookery program aimed at ideas for the home cook.

programme.title: Travel Guides
programme.desc: Your fave Aussie Travel Guides are having holiday fun in their own backyard! Tonight, the guides are in Alice Springs as they follow in the footsteps of Priscilla, Queen of Desert.

programme.title: Tipping Point Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Australian tennis legend Todd Woodbridge, Tipping Point will push contestants' luck to the very edge in their quest to beat the mesmerising device and win mystery prizes and cash!

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa becomes addicted to second-hand smoke when she joins a ballet academy. S19 E15

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While the gang celebrates Bernadette's pregnancy announcement, Howard freaks out, convinced that he'll need to make more money to provide for the baby. S9 E16

programme.title: Home And Away
programme.desc: Eden has second thoughts. Dana and Alf work together. Is Justin in danger?

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Chris can't help himself.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: In the first elimination of the competition, 23 cooks will show the judges a window into their homelife, through a favourite dish that they cook at home for their loved ones. S18 E5

programme.title: The Rookie
programme.desc: Nolan and Harper try to help a desperate mother protect her child; Lt. Grey and Garza continue to work with Monica despite their misgivings. S8 E17

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Rhod Gilbert endangers Alex's life (again), Jessica Knappett's sunny outlook on life is severely tested by a former traffic warden and Phil Wang has a lovely old time with a jar of mayonnaise. S7 E5

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation
programme.desc: Langston testifies against the notorious 'Dick and Jane' killer. Meanwhile, Nick receives a call from troubled teen Jason McCann to warn him of impending danger. Guest starring Justin Bieber. S11 E15

programme.title: Killer Couples
programme.desc: When murder strikes a generous multi-millionaire, detectives uncover a mountain of family secrets, a history of sexual abuse and greedy young lovers in the centre of it all. S7 E7

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Long-running soap following the ups and downs of village life amid the rolling scenery of the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.title: Damages
programme.desc: Patty tries to contain the damage caused by Gregory Malina's sudden disappearance, while Ellen's attentions are diverted by her own father's pending legal troubles. S1 E8

programme.title: Superstore
programme.desc: When Glenn publicly congratulates Jonah for his superb test results, Amy becomes annoyed and competitive, resulting in a chaotic battle of street smarts vs. book smarts. S1 E6

programme.title: Infomercial
programme.desc: Infomercials is an umbrella title for independent, quarter-hour television comedy specials airing on Adult Swim. Unlike actual paid programming, all of the programs are fictitious and maintain no continuity with each other.

programme.desc: Robin, Cyborg, Starfire, Raven and Beast Boy are superheroes and roommates who love to save the day. But what happens when they're not fighting crime?

programme.title: Les Mills Adult Classes
programme.desc: Les Mills and TVNZ are thrilled to be working together to offer you free access to renowned Les Mills classes; BODYBALANCE, BODYCOMBAT, BODYATTACK, LES MILLS CORE and LES MILLS GRIT Cardio.

programme.title: Masterchef Australia
programme.desc: In the first elimination of the competition, 23 cooks will show the judges a window into their homelife, through a favourite dish that they cook at home for their loved ones. S18 E5

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Driven by humour and optimism, Drew Barrymore presents human interest stories and has heartfelt conversations with special guests.

programme.title: Shortland Street
programme.desc: Chris can't help himself.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part One: The murder of a festival queen puts a strain on Florence's relationship when it turns out Patrice knew the victim.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part Two: After another killing connected to the festival queen case, the team head to nearby Rosalie Island to follow up a new lead about a mysterious phone call.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric. Father Brown is determined to find out why the body of a young man was taken from his graveyard.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric. Brown investigates when the son of a local aeronautics magnate is murdered. Lady Felicia loses her singing voice.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: Mark Williams is the sleuthing cleric. Father Brown encounters a voodoo priest who is intent on winning back the woman he loves.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger, a missing donkey, an outbreak of laryngitis in the church choir and a kidnapped baby threaten to spoil the Christmas festivities.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: I No More Desire A Rose: Frank and Lu are hired to unmask a 'Voice in the Dark' who threatens to destroy Wintermas, and Sebastian faces his first solo case.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Such a Mad Marriage Never Was Before: Tensions rise as Frank and Lu are forced to reunite and work together on the case of a married couple in strife.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Frank, Lu and Sebastian go undercover at a remote team building centre to root out a corporate spy.

programme.title: Allegiance
programme.desc: On Sabrina's first day with Serious Crimes, an investigation into a woman's murder leads her into the sinister side of the tech world as she adjusts to a more dangerous role.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A death on a survival show's live broadcast uncovers murder disguised as a bear attack, and the team must set up a televised trap to catch the killer.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: Part Two: After another killing connected to the festival queen case, the team head to nearby Rosalie Island to follow up a new lead about a mysterious phone call.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: A mysterious stranger, a missing donkey, an outbreak of laryngitis in the church choir and a kidnapped baby threaten to spoil the Christmas festivities.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: I No More Desire A Rose: Frank and Lu are hired to unmask a 'Voice in the Dark' who threatens to destroy Wintermas, and Sebastian faces his first solo case.

programme.title: Shakespeare & Hathaway Private Investigators
programme.desc: Such a Mad Marriage Never Was Before: Tensions rise as Frank and Lu are forced to reunite and work together on the case of a married couple in strife.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Part Two: Murdoch quickly realises that the boy who tried to avenge Anna's murder is his son. Ogden is stunned but eager to accept the boy out of love for Murdoch.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A vaudeville comic's death leads Murdoch to suspect that Charlie Chaplin was the intended target.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: Brackenreid learns his son is wanted for murder and refuses Murdoch's help with the case.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The sleuth teams up with Arthur Conan Doyle to solve a murder that was revealed during a seance. Period drama, starring Yannick Bisson.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A groom is killed on his wedding day, and Murdoch soon learns the man was a homosexual and the marriage a sham, contrived to secure a substantial inheritance.

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: After a mysterious thief keeps stealing valuable treasures from under his nose, Hercule Flambeau asks Father Brown to help him eliminate the competition.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The agents track down the killer of a man who believed he was abducted by aliens, and Van Pelt takes time off from the investigation to shop for a wedding dress.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A stock market guru's fortune is stolen, setting Charlie and Rex on the trail of a very surprising thief..

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie goes undercover as a chemical engineer with a band of professional bank robbers planning a multimillion-dollar heist, but Al fears she is in way over her head.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: There's a political puzzle to solve as the mayoral elections are thrown into disarray when a candidate is stabbed to death in the polling booth while voting.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: The sleuth teams up with Arthur Conan Doyle to solve a murder that was revealed during a seance. Period drama, starring Yannick Bisson.

programme.title: Murdoch Mysteries
programme.desc: A groom is killed on his wedding day, and Murdoch soon learns the man was a homosexual and the marriage a sham, contrived to secure a substantial inheritance.

programme.title: The Mentalist
programme.desc: The agents track down the killer of a man who believed he was abducted by aliens, and Van Pelt takes time off from the investigation to shop for a wedding dress.

programme.title: Hudson & Rex
programme.desc: A stock market guru's fortune is stolen, setting Charlie and Rex on the trail of a very surprising thief..

programme.title: Father Brown
programme.desc: After a mysterious thief keeps stealing valuable treasures from under his nose, Hercule Flambeau asks Father Brown to help him eliminate the competition.

programme.title: Unforgettable
programme.desc: Carrie goes undercover as a chemical engineer with a band of professional bank robbers planning a multimillion-dollar heist, but Al fears she is in way over her head.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: There's a political puzzle to solve as the mayoral elections are thrown into disarray when a candidate is stabbed to death in the polling booth while voting.

programme.title: Return to Paradise
programme.desc: DI Mackenzie Clarke faces two big mysteries: the murder of a wellness influencer during a fun run, and how to stop local bathers taking short-cuts through her property.

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: When a TV news presenter is found strangled in her pool, Neville is sure that her popular co-host is guilty.

programme.title: Wild Scandinavia
programme.desc: Scandinavia's extremes have been shaped by ice and fire, but it's the sun that reigns here. The wildlife must survive from the polar night to the midnight sun.

programme.title: New Zealand: Earth's Mythical Islands
programme.desc: Isolated since the time of the dinosaurs, New Zealand houses a broad range of wildlife. Witness kiwis, forest-dwelling penguins and predators from the Jurassic era.

programme.title: New Zealand: Earth's Mythical Islands
programme.desc: From whip-smart parrots to sinister snails and constellations of glowworms, learn how animals embrace radical solutions to survive in New Zealand's wildest places.

programme.title: Wild Scandinavia
programme.desc: A look at the magical forests that wrap around a labyrinth of waterways in Scandinavia, where wildlife survives the changing seasons through surprising alliances.

programme.title: Wild Scandinavia
programme.desc: Scandinavia's extremes have been shaped by ice and fire, but it's the sun that reigns here. The wildlife must survive from the polar night to the midnight sun.

programme.title: New Zealand: Earth's Mythical Islands
programme.desc: Isolated since the time of the dinosaurs, New Zealand houses a broad range of wildlife. Witness kiwis, forest-dwelling penguins and predators from the Jurassic era.

programme.title: New Zealand: Earth's Mythical Islands
programme.desc: From whip-smart parrots to sinister snails and constellations of glowworms, learn how animals embrace radical solutions to survive in New Zealand's wildest places.

programme.title: Wild Scandinavia
programme.desc: A look at the magical forests that wrap around a labyrinth of waterways in Scandinavia, where wildlife survives the changing seasons through surprising alliances.

programme.desc: A look at the magical forests that wrap around a labyrinth of waterways in Scandinavia, where wildlife survives the changing seasons through surprising alliances.

programme.title: New Zealand: Earth's Mythical Islands
programme.desc: Isolated since the time of the dinosaurs, New Zealand houses a broad range of wildlife. Witness kiwis, forest-dwelling penguins and predators from the Jurassic era.

programme.title: New Zealand: Earth's Mythical Islands
programme.desc: From whip-smart parrots to sinister snails and constellations of glowworms, learn how animals embrace radical solutions to survive in New Zealand's wildest places.

programme.title: New Zealand: Earth's Mythical Islands

programme.title: New Zealand: Earth's Mythical Islands
programme.desc: From whip-smart parrots to sinister snails and constellations of glowworms, learn how animals embrace radical solutions to survive in New Zealand's wildest places.

programme.title: Expedition with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Dark Shadow: The team battle through the jungle into the heart of Indonesian Borneo to caves holding secrets that could rewrite history.

programme.title: Attenborough's Natural Curiosities
programme.desc: David Attenborough examines creatures that have fascinated us for centuries. A look at the animal kingdom's bizarre hybrids.

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Shopping from Home.

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: In Perth, the pressure is on for a team tackling a high-stakes engine rebuild, and in Townsville, a crew of experts build a massive underframe for a freight powerhouse.

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: A locomotive needs a quick double bogie change to get back to the sugarcane harvest. Meanwhile, the heat is on for a tricky air conditioner replacement.

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: A freight train needs an urgent engine replacement after a critical failure, and a crew works on a complex bogie change for a 132 T locomotive.

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: A busy commuter train undergoes a tough traction motor replacement, while a leaky torque seal sidelines a sugarcane locomotive urgently needed for the harvest.

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: In Perth, the pressure is on for a team tackling a high-stakes engine rebuild, and in Townsville, a crew of experts build a massive underframe for a freight powerhouse.

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: A locomotive needs a quick double bogie change to get back to the sugarcane harvest. Meanwhile, the heat is on for a tricky air conditioner replacement.

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: A freight train needs an urgent engine replacement after a critical failure, and a crew works on a complex bogie change for a 132 T locomotive.

programme.title: Train Rescue Down Under
programme.desc: A busy commuter train undergoes a tough traction motor replacement, while a leaky torque seal sidelines a sugarcane locomotive urgently needed for the harvest.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Classic sitcom. Terry tries to track down some of his old flames, but his probing produces embarrassing results.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Bob throws a surprise party for Terry. But when Terry is blindfolded and led into the crowd, he criticises old pals, unaware that they are present.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Bob and Terry try to avoid hearing a football score before they watch a recording of the match on TV.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Laddish sitcom from the terrific team of Dick Clement and Ian La Frenais. Bob thinks Terry needs new mates, so invites him to a trendy dinner party.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: 70s sitcom from the creators of Porridge. Terry helps Bob move his treasured possessions from his old house to the new one, but Thelma does not approve.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Classic sitcom. Terry tries to track down some of his old flames, but his probing produces embarrassing results.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Bob throws a surprise party for Terry. But when Terry is blindfolded and led into the crowd, he criticises old pals, unaware that they are present.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Bob and Terry try to avoid hearing a football score before they watch a recording of the match on TV.

programme.title: Whatever Happened to the Likely Lads
programme.desc: Laddish sitcom from the terrific team of Dick Clement and Ian La Frenais. Bob thinks Terry needs new mates, so invites him to a trendy dinner party.
